Mins = when } while shared.ExpChatRemake.Mutes[userid] and (os.clock()+when*60)-os.clock() > 0 do task.wait() end shared.ExpChatRemake.Mutes[userid] = false end shared.ExpChatRemake.Mute = function(who, userid, reason) shared.ExpChatRemake.Mutes[userid] = { Admin = who, Reason = reason } end local function call(...) Display:Fire(...) end shared.ExpChatRemake.Global = function(text, mt) MessagingService:PublishAsync("Global", {t = text, m = mt}) end shared.ExpChatRemake.Server = function(text, mt) call("all", '[Server]: '..text, mt or "") end MessagingService:SubscribeAsync("Global", function(m) call("all", '[Global]: '..m.Data.t, m.Data.m or "") end) end) local function r() local char = string.char(math.random(32, 126)) while char == '+' or char == '{' or char == "}" or char == "[" or char == "]" do return r() end return char end local function generateCodeTable() local l = 5 local ct = {} for i = 1,255,1 do local c = string.char(i) ct[c] = "" for _ = 1,l do ct[c] ..= r() end end return ct,l end local codeTable, length = generateCodeTable() code.setCodeTable(codeTable, length) if TextChatService.CreateDefaultTextChannels then warn("You need to disable 'TextChatService.CreateDefaultTextChannels' to make script work") return end -- does some things task.spawn(function() pcall(function() TextChatService:WaitForChild("ChatWindowConfiguration"):SetAttribute("CustomEnabled", true) TextChatService:WaitForChild("ChatInputBarConfiguration"):SetAttribute("CustomEnabled", true) end) end) -- hide ts from roblox server lol script.Parent = nil local WHITESPACES = { "\n\r\t\v\f", { ["\n"] = " ", ["\r"] = " ", ["\t"] = " ", ["\v"] = " ", ["\f"] = " " }, { ["\n"] = "\\n", ["\r"] = "\\r", ["\t"] = "\\t", ["\v"] = "\\v", ["\f"] = "\\f" } } local REPLACE = { `&<>"'`, { ["&"] = "&", ["<"] = "<", [">"] = ">", ['"'] = '"', ["'"] = ''', } } Remotes.Name = "Remotes" Update.Name = "Update" Ping.Name = "Ping" History.Name = "History" Event.Name = "Event" StatusChanged.Name = "StatusChanged" DisplaySystem.Name = "DisplaySystem" CreateUI.Name = "CreateUI" Display.Name = "Display" Success.Name = "Success" TypingChanged.Name = "TypingChanged" Remotes.Parent = ReplicatedStorage Modules.Parent = ReplicatedStorage Handler.Parent = game:GetService("TestService") Handler.Enabled = true NOTRBXGeneral.Name = "NOTRBXGeneral" NOTRBXGeneral.ShouldDeliverCallback = function(message, textsource) return end local function StartAntiFlood(player) pcall(function() PlayersChat[player].Time = 10 while PlayersChat[player].Time > 0 do task.wait(1) PlayersChat[player].Time -= 1 end PlayersChat[player] = { Messages = 0, Time = 0 } end) end local function GetFilterResult(text, fromUserId) local filterResult local success, errorMessage = pcall(function() filterResult = TextService:FilterStringAsync(text, fromUserId) end) if success then return filterResult else --warn("Error generating TextFilterResult:", errorMessage) return nil end end local function RemoveSlop(text) return text:gsub("[%p%c]+", ""):gsub("[%s]+", " ") end local function CheckMessage(text) text = text:gsub(`[{WHITESPACES[1]}]`, WHITESPACES[2]) text = text:gsub('<([%w%s="\'`()#/]+)>', ''):gsub('%%([%w%s="\'`()#/]+);', '') local text = text:split(" ") local whatrm = {} for index, _ in text do if text[index] == "" then whatrm[#whatrm+1] = index end end local lol = 0 for _, index in whatrm do table.remove(text, index-lol) lol += 1 end return table.concat(text, " ") end local function Replace(text) text = text:gsub(`[{REPLACE[1]}]`, REPLACE[2]) return text end local function HowThisCanBeDisplayed(message, player) message = CheckMessage(message) if message == "" or message:gsub(" ", "") == "" then return end local unfiltered = message local messagenoslop = RemoveSlop(message) local tmp = messagenoslop local FilterResult1 = GetFilterResult(messagenoslop, player.UserId) local FilterResult2 = GetFilterResult(message, player.UserId) local s1,_ = pcall(function() messagenoslop = FilterResult1:GetNonChatStringForBroadcastAsync() end) local s2,_ = pcall(function() message = FilterResult2:GetNonChatStringForBroadcastAsync() end) if not s1 or not s2 or messagenoslop ~= tmp then message = table.concat(table.create(#message, "#"), "") end if message:find("roblox") and (message:find("www") or message:find("com")) then message = table.concat(table.create(#message, "#"), "") end if message ~= unfiltered then unfiltered ..= " [FILTERED]" end if #message > 200 then return end message = Replace(message) return unfiltered, message end local function GetPlayer(playerReq: Player, name: string) if name then name = name:lower() local players = {} for _, player in Players:GetPlayers() do if player == playerReq then continue end if player.DisplayName:lower():sub(1,name:len()) == name or player.Name:lower():sub(1,name:len()) == name then players[#players+1] = player end end print(players) return #players == 1 and players[1] or #players > 1 and players else return end end local function ReplaceCommand(OG: TextChatCommand, Name: string, Function) local Custom = OG:Clone() Custom.Triggered:Connect(Function or function(...) return ... end) Custom.Name = Name Custom.Parent = OG.Parent OG:Destroy() end local function CreateCommand(Name: string, Where: Instance, PrimaryAlias: string, SecondaryAlias: string, Function) local Command = Instance.new("TextChatCommand") Command.PrimaryAlias = PrimaryAlias Command.SecondaryAlias = SecondaryAlias Command.Triggered:Connect(Function or function(...) return ... end) Command.Name = Name Command.Parent = Where end local function fix(text) if text and typeof(text) == "string" and text:sub(1,1) == " " then return text:sub(2) end return text end task.spawn(function() pcall(function() ReplaceCommand(TextChatService:WaitForChild("TextChatCommands"):WaitForChild("RBXTeamCommand"), "RBXCustomTeamCommand", function(ts: TextSource, text) local player = Players:GetPlayerByUserId(ts.UserId) local team = player.Team local message = table.concat(text:split(" "), " ", 2) if player and team and message then if shared.ExpChatRemake.Mutes[player.UserId] then DisplaySystem:FireClient(player, encode(`You're currenly muted by '{shared.ExpChatRemake.Mutes[player.UserId].Admin}' reason: '{shared.ExpChatRemake.Mutes[player.UserId].Reason}'`)) return end if PlayersChat[player].Messages >= 5 then DisplaySystem:FireClient(player, encode(`You must wait before sending another message.`)) return end local unfiltered, message = HowThisCanBeDisplayed(message, player) if not unfiltered or not message then return end if PlayersChat[player].Messages == 0 then PlayersChat[player].Messages += 1 task.spawn(StartAntiFlood, player) else PlayersChat[player].Messages += 1 PlayersChat[player].Time += 1 end for _, playerr in team:GetPlayers() do if not table.find(PlayersMute[player.UserId], playerr) then Event:FireClient(playerr, encode(player.Name), encode(message), nil, team, player:GetAttribute("IconInChat")) end end Success:Fire(player, unfiltered, team) else if player and message and not team then DisplaySystem:FireClient(player, encode('You cannot team chat if you are not on a team.')) end end end) ReplaceCommand(TextChatService:WaitForChild("TextChatCommands"):WaitForChild("RBXWhisperCommand"), "RBXCustomWhisperCommand", function(ts: TextSource, text) local player = Players:GetPlayerByUserId(ts.UserId) local player2 = GetPlayer(player, text:split(" ")[2]) local message = table.concat(text:split(" "), " ", 3) if player and player2 then if typeof(player2) == "table" then DisplaySystem:FireClient(player, encode(`There are {#player2} players with similar name: {table.concat(player2, ", ")}`)) return end if shared.ExpChatRemake.Mutes[player.UserId] then DisplaySystem:FireClient(player, encode(`You're currenly muted by '{shared.ExpChatRemake.Mutes[player.UserId].Admin}' reason: '{shared.ExpChatRemake.Mutes[player.UserId].Reason}'`)) return end if PlayersChat[player].Messages >= 5 then DisplaySystem:FireClient(player, encode(`You must wait before sending another message.`)) return end local unfiltered, message = HowThisCanBeDisplayed(message, player) if not unfiltered or not message then return end if PlayersChat[player].Messages == 0 then PlayersChat[player].Messages += 1 task.spawn(StartAntiFlood, player) else PlayersChat[player].Messages += 1 PlayersChat[player].Time += 1 end if typeof(player2) == "Instance" and player2:IsA("Player") then Event:FireClient(player, encode(player.Name), encode(message), encode(player2.Name), nil, player:GetAttribute("IconInChat")) if not table.find(PlayersMute[player.UserId], player2) then Event:FireClient(player2, encode(player.Name), encode(message), encode(player2.Name), nil, player:GetAttribute("IconInChat")) end Success:Fire(player, unfiltered, player2) else DisplaySystem:FireClient(player, encode('Failed to whisper player')) end else if player and not player2 then DisplaySystem:FireClient(player, encode(`User '{text:split(" ")[2]}' does not exist.`)) end end end) ReplaceCommand(TextChatService:WaitForChild("TextChatCommands"):WaitForChild("RBXHelpCommand"), "RBXCustomHelpCommand") ReplaceCommand(TextChatService:WaitForChild("TextChatCommands"):WaitForChild("RBXMuteCommand"), "RBXCustomMuteCommand", function(ts: TextSource, text) local player = Players:GetPlayerByUserId(ts.UserId) local player2 = GetPlayer(player, text:split(" ")[2]) if player and player2 then if typeof(player2) == "table" then DisplaySystem:FireClient(player, encode(`There are {#player2} players with similar name: {table.concat(player2, ", ")}`)) return end if player == player2 then return end local index = table.find(PlayersMute[player2.UserId], player) if index then DisplaySystem:FireClient(player, encode('Player is already muted')) else table.insert(PlayersMute[player2.UserId], player) end else if player and not player2 then DisplaySystem:FireClient(player, encode(`User '{text:split(" ")[2]}' does not exist.`)) end end end) ReplaceCommand(TextChatService:WaitForChild("TextChatCommands"):WaitForChild("RBXUnmuteCommand"), "RBXCustomUnmuteCommand", function(ts: TextSource, text) local player = Players:GetPlayerByUserId(ts.UserId) local player2 = GetPlayer(player, text:split(" ")[2]) if player and player2 then if typeof(player2) == "table" then DisplaySystem:FireClient(player, encode(`There are {#player2} players with similar name: {table.concat(player2, ", ")}`)) return end if player == player2 then return end local index = table.find(PlayersMute[player2.UserId], player) if index then table.remove(PlayersMute[player2.UserId], index) else DisplaySystem:FireClient(player, encode('Player is not muted')) end else if player and not player2 then DisplaySystem:FireClient(player, encode(`User '{text:split(" ")[2]}' does not exist.`)) end end end) local chat_version = `{script.Name}.server.lua (made by @GAMECHATLOGGER, aka @CameraAttachment)` ReplaceCommand(TextChatService:WaitForChild("TextChatCommands"):WaitForChild("RBXVersionCommand"), "RBXCustomVersionCommand", function(ts: TextSource) local player = Players:GetPlayerByUserId(ts.UserId) if player then DisplaySystem:FireClient(player, encode(`{chat_version}`)) end end) end) CreateCommand("NOTRBXServerMuteCommand", TextChatService:WaitForChild("TextChatCommands"), "/servermute", "/sm", function(ts: TextSource, text) local player = Players:GetPlayerByUserId(ts.UserId) local split = text:split(";") local player2 = GetPlayer(player, split[1]:split(" ")[2]) local reason, mins = fix(split[2]), fix(split[3]) if player and player2 then if typeof(player2) == "table" then DisplaySystem:FireClient(player, encode(`There are {#player2} players with similar name: {table.concat(player2, ", ")}`)) return end if player == player2 then return end if not Creators[player.UserId] then return end if Creators[player2.UserId] == "hammer-code" or Creators[player2.UserId] == "gear" then DisplaySystem:FireClient(player, encode(`Can't mute player '{player2.DisplayName}'.`)) return end if shared.ExpChatRemake.Mutes[player2.UserId] then DisplaySystem:FireClient(player, encode(`'{player2.DisplayName}' is already muted`)) else if mins then shared.ExpChatRemake.TempMute(player.DisplayName, player2.UserId, reason, mins) else shared.ExpChatRemake.Mute(player.DisplayName, player2.UserId, reason) end DisplaySystem:FireClient(player, encode(`Successfully muted '{player2.DisplayName}'`)) end else if player and not player2 then DisplaySystem:FireClient(player, encode(`Player '{text:split(" ")[2]:sub(1,-2)}' does not exist.`)) end end end) CreateCommand("NOTRBXServerUnmuteCommand", TextChatService:WaitForChild("TextChatCommands"), "/serverunmute", "/sum", function(ts: TextSource, text) local player = Players:GetPlayerByUserId(ts.UserId) local player2 = GetPlayer(player, text:split(" ")[2]) if player and player2 then if typeof(player2) == "table" then DisplaySystem:FireClient(player, encode(`There are {#player2} players with similar name: {table.concat(player2, ", ")}`)) return end if player == player2 then return end if not Creators[player.UserId] then return end if Creators[player2.UserId] == "hammer-code" or Creators[player2.UserId] == "gear" then DisplaySystem:FireClient(player, encode(`Can't unmute player '{player2.DisplayName}'.`)) return end if shared.ExpChatRemake.Mutes[player2.UserId] then shared.ExpChatRemake.Mutes[player2.UserId] = false DisplaySystem:FireClient(player, encode(`Successfully unmuted '{player2.DisplayName}'`)) else DisplaySystem:FireClient(player, encode(`'{player2.DisplayName}' is not muted`)) end else if player and not player2 then DisplaySystem:FireClient(player, encode(`Player '{text:split(" ")[2]}' does not exist.`)) end end end) CreateCommand("NOTRBXSitCommand", TextChatService:WaitForChild("TextChatCommands"), "/sit", "", function(ts: TextSource) local player = Players:GetPlayerByUserId(ts.UserId) if player then local character = player.Character if character then local humanoid = character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") if humanoid then humanoid.Sit = true end end end end) end) Update.OnServerInvoke = function(player, message) message = decode(message) if shared.ExpChatRemake.Mutes[player.UserId] then DisplaySystem:FireClient(player, encode(`You're currenly muted by '{shared.ExpChatRemake.Mutes[player.UserId].Admin}' reason: '{shared.ExpChatRemake.Mutes[player.UserId].Reason}'`)) return end if PlayersChat[player].Messages >= 5 then DisplaySystem:FireClient(player, encode(`You must wait before sending another message.`)) return end local unfiltered, message = HowThisCanBeDisplayed(message, player) if not unfiltered or not message then return end if PlayersChat[player].Messages == 0 then PlayersChat[player].Messages += 1 task.spawn(StartAntiFlood, player) else PlayersChat[player].Messages += 1 PlayersChat[player].Time += 1 end for _, playerr in Players:GetPlayers() do if not table.find(PlayersMute[player.UserId], playerr) then Event:FireClient(playerr, encode(player.Name), encode(message), nil, nil, player:GetAttribute("IconInChat")) end end Success:Fire(player, unfiltered) return true end Ping.OnServerInvoke = function(player, message) message = decode(message) return HowThisCanBeDisplayed(message, player) end Success.Event:Connect(function(player, message, pot, sign) local prefix = player.Name if pot then if pot:IsA("Team") then prefix = `[Team {pot.Name}] {prefix}` elseif pot:IsA("Player") then prefix = `[To {pot.Name}] {prefix}` end end table.insert(HistoryList, `{prefix}: {message}`) if #HistoryList > 67108864 then table.remove(HistoryList, 1) end end) History.OnInvoke = function() return HistoryList end Display.Event:Connect(function(player, message, mt) if player:lower() == "all" then DisplaySystem:FireAllClients(encode(message), encode(mt)) else player = GetPlayer(player) if typeof(player) == "Instance" and player:IsA("Player") then DisplaySystem:FireClient(player, encode(message), encode(mt)) end end end) local function ReplicateTyping(player, typing, specific) if specific then if not (PlayersMute[specific.UserId] and table.find(PlayersMute[specific.UserId], player)) then TypingChanged:FireClient(specific, player, typing) end else for _, playerr in Players:GetPlayers() do if not (PlayersMute[playerr.UserId] and table.find(PlayersMute[playerr.UserId], player)) then TypingChanged:FireClient(playerr, player, typing) end end end end TypingChanged.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player, typing) if not shared.ExpChatRemake.Mutes[player.UserId] then if typing then if PlayersTyping[player] then PlayersTyping[player].LastType = os.clock() else PlayersTyping[player] = { LastType = os.clock() } PlayersTyping[player].Connection = RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function() if os.clock() - PlayersTyping[player].LastType > 5 then PlayersTyping[player].Connection:Disconnect() PlayersTyping[player] = nil ReplicateTyping(player, false) end end) ReplicateTyping(player, typing) end else if PlayersTyping[player] then PlayersTyping[player].Connection:Disconnect() PlayersTyping[player] = nil ReplicateTyping(player, typing) end end end end) Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player) player:SetAttribute("CantDoAnything", true) if game.PrivateServerOwnerId == player.UserId then Creators[player.UserId] = `circle-star` end local function alt() local success, icon = pcall(function() return ExpChatCreators:GetAsync(player.UserId) end) while not success do task.wait(1) success, icon = pcall(function() return ExpChatCreators:GetAsync(player.UserId) end) end if icon then Creators[player.UserId] = icon end end task.spawn(pcall, function() ReplicatedStorage.giveclient:InvokeClient(player, codeTable, length) end) PlayersChat[player] = { Messages = 0, Time = 0 } PlayersMute[player.UserId] = {} NOTRBXGeneral:AddUserAsync(player.UserId) if ExpChatCreators and game.PlaceId ~= 0 then if game.CreatorType == Enum.CreatorType.User then if game.CreatorId == player.UserId then Creators[player.UserId] = `hammer-code` else alt() end else if player:GetRankInGroupAsync(game.CreatorId) >= 254 then Creators[player.UserId] = `hammer-code` else alt() end end else Creators[player.UserId] = `hammer-code` end if not player.Character then player.CharacterAdded:Wait() end player:SetAttribute("CanAddChatTime", os.clock()) player:SetAttribute("IconInChat", Creators[player.UserId]) player:SetAttribute("CantDoAnything", nil) end) Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player) PlayersChat[player] = nil PlayersMute[player.UserId] = nil Creators[player.UserId] = nil end) CreateUI.OnServerInvoke = function(player) local playergui = player:FindFirstChild("PlayerGui") local UII = nil if playergui and os.clock()-(player:GetAttribute("CanAddChatTime") or 1/0) > -.1 then player:SetAttribute("CanAddChatTime", nil) UII = UI:Clone() UII.Parent = player.PlayerGui task.delay(0.5, function() StatusChanged:FireClient(player, PlayersMute[player]) for _, playerr in PlayersTyping do ReplicateTyping(playerr, true, player) end end) end return UII end local Mutes = table.clone(shared.ExpChatRemake.Mutes) while task.wait(0.1) do for playeruserid, status in shared.ExpChatRemake.Mutes do local player = Players:GetPlayerByUserId(playeruserid) if player then if typeof(Mutes[player.UserId]) ~= typeof(status) then if status then DisplaySystem:FireClient(player, encode(`You got {status.Mins and "temporary muted" or "muted"} by '{status.Admin}'{status.Reason and `, reason: '{status.Reason}'` or ""}`)) else DisplaySystem:FireClient(player, encode(`You got unmuted`)) end StatusChanged:FireClient(player, status) end end Mutes[playeruserid] = status end end

Children.Source:
if not game:IsLoaded() then
	game.Loaded:Wait()
end

script.Parent = nil

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local LocalPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer
local TextChatService = game:GetService("TextChatService")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local NOTRBXGeneral = TextChatService:WaitForChild("NOTRBXGeneral")
local Modules = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Modules")
local Remotes = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Remotes")
local ComputeNameColor = require(Modules:WaitForChild("NameColor"))

while not shared.code do
	task.wait()
end

local decode = shared.code.decode

Remotes:WaitForChild("Event").OnClientEvent:Connect(function(player, message, player2, team, icon)
	message = decode(message)
	player = Players:FindFirstChild(decode(player))
	player2 = (player2 and Players:FindFirstChild(decode(player2))) or team
	local C = player.Team and player.TeamColor.Color or ComputeNameColor(player.Name)
	local RGB = `#{C:ToHex()}`
	NOTRBXGeneral:DisplaySystemMessage(`<font color="{RGB}">{player2 and (player2:IsA("Team") and `[Team] ` or `</font>[{player2 == LocalPlayer and `From {player.DisplayName}` or `To {player2.DisplayName}`}] <font color="{RGB}">`) or ""}{player.DisplayName}{icon and `<font family="rbxasset://LuaPackages/Packages/_Index/BuilderIcons/BuilderIcons/BuilderIcons.json" color="#ffffff">{icon}</font>` or ""}{player.MembershipType == Enum.MembershipType.Premium and utf8.char(0xE001) or ""}{player.HasVerifiedBadge and utf8.char(0xE000) or ""}:</font>!!separator!! {message}`, player.Name)
	if player.Character and message ~= "" then
		TextChatService:DisplayBubble(player.Character, message)
	end
end)

Remotes:WaitForChild("DisplaySystem").OnClientEvent:Connect(function(message, metadata)
	NOTRBXGeneral:DisplaySystemMessage(decode(message), metadata and decode(metadata) or "")
end)

Remotes:WaitForChild("Fire").Event:Connect(function(command)
	NOTRBXGeneral:SendAsync(command)
end)

game:GetService("RunService").RenderStepped:Connect(function()
	TextChatService:WaitForChild("ChatWindowConfiguration").Enabled = false
	TextChatService:WaitForChild("ChatInputBarConfiguration").Enabled = false
end)

while not LocalPlayer.PlayerGui:FindFirstChild("Experience") and not LocalPlayer.PlayerGui:FindFirstChild("FakeExperience") do
	Remotes:WaitForChild("CreateUI"):InvokeServer()
	task.wait(0.1)
end
Children.Name: Handler

Children.Source:
local NAME_COLORS = {
	Color3.fromRGB(253, 41, 67),
	Color3.fromRGB(1, 162, 255),
	Color3.fromRGB(2, 184, 87),
	BrickColor.new("Bright violet").Color,
	BrickColor.new("Bright orange").Color,
	BrickColor.new("Bright yellow").Color,
	BrickColor.new("Light reddish violet").Color,
	BrickColor.new("Brick yellow").Color,
}

local function GetNameValue(pName)
	local value = 0
	for index = 1, #pName do
		local cValue = string.byte(string.sub(pName, index, index))
		local reverseIndex = #pName - index + 1
		if #pName%2 == 1 then
			reverseIndex = reverseIndex - 1
		end
		if reverseIndex%4 >= 2 then
			cValue = -cValue
		end
		value = value + cValue
	end
	return value
end

local color_offset = 0

local function ComputeNameColor(pName)
	return NAME_COLORS[((GetNameValue(pName) + color_offset) % #NAME_COLORS) + 1]
end

return ComputeNameColor
Children.Name: NameColor

Children.Source:
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local TextChatService = game:GetService("TextChatService")
local FireCommand = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):WaitForChild("Remotes"):WaitForChild("Fire")
local Commands = {}
local IsClient = game:GetService("RunService"):IsClient()
local ClientCommands = {}

if IsClient then
	ClientCommands = {
		RBXCustomHelpCommand = function()
			TextChatService:WaitForChild("NOTRBXGeneral"):DisplaySystemMessage('<font color="#d4d4d4">/clear -- clear chat\n/whisper [player] [message] -- send private message to speaker\n/team [message] -- send message for your team\n/console -- open developer console\n/emote [emote name] -- play emote\n/mute [player name] -- mute player\n/unmute [player name] -- unmute player</font>')
		end,
		NOTRBXfreekorbloxrealfrfr = function()
			if Players.LocalPlayer.Character and not Players.LocalPlayer.Character:GetAttribute("tfilcommand") then
				Players.LocalPlayer.Character:SetAttribute("tfilcommand", true)
				task.wait(1.5)
				shared.triggerTCH("free korblox? ok wait a sec", nil, "Client")
			end
		end,
	}
end

local function addcommand(TextChatCommand: TextChatCommand)
	--print('Command', TextChatCommand.Name)
	Commands[#Commands+1] = {
		TextChatCommand = TextChatCommand,
		PrimaryAlias = TextChatCommand.PrimaryAlias,
		SecondaryAlias = TextChatCommand.SecondaryAlias
	}
	if IsClient and ClientCommands[TextChatCommand.Name] then
		TextChatCommand.Triggered:Connect(ClientCommands[TextChatCommand.Name])
	end
end

TextChatService.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(TextChatCommand)
	if TextChatCommand:IsA("TextChatCommand") then
		addcommand(TextChatCommand)
	end
end)

TextChatService.DescendantRemoving:Connect(function(TextChatCommand)
	if TextChatCommand:IsA("TextChatCommand") then
		--warn('Command', TextChatCommand.Name)
		for I, Command in Commands do
			if Command.TextChatCommand == TextChatCommand then
				table.remove(Commands, I)
			end
		end
	end
end)

for _, TextChatCommand in TextChatService:WaitForChild("TextChatCommands"):GetChildren() do
	if TextChatCommand:IsA("TextChatCommand") then
		addcommand(TextChatCommand)
	end
end

return {
	function(message)
		local split = message:split(" ")
		local command = split[1]
		local message = table.concat(split, " ", 2)
		for _, Command in Commands do
			if command == Command.PrimaryAlias or command == Command.SecondaryAlias then
				FireCommand:Fire(`{command} {message}`)
				return Command.TextChatCommand
			end
		end
		return nil
	end, 
	function(message)
		local split = message:split(" ")
		if split[1]:sub(1,1) == "/" then
			for _, Command in Commands do
				if split[1] == Command.PrimaryAlias or split[1] == Command.SecondaryAlias then
					return true
				end
			end
		end
		return false
	end
}
Children.Name: Something

Children.Source:
local UI = script.Parent
local received_template = script.Received
local systemreceived_template = script.SystemReceived
local autocomplete_template = script.Autocomplete
local emojiautocomplete_template = script.EmojiAutocomplete

script.Parent = nil

local focused = false
local oc = os.clock()+3
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local LocalPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer
local TextChatService = game:GetService("TextChatService")
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")
local StarterGui = game:GetService("StarterGui")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local Messages = {}
local Remotes = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Remotes")
local Modules = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Modules")
local send = Remotes:WaitForChild("Update")
local ping = Remotes:WaitForChild("Ping")
local typingchange = Remotes:WaitForChild("TypingChanged")
local ComputeNameColor = require(Modules:WaitForChild("NameColor"))
local TextChatCommands = require(Modules:WaitForChild("Something"))
local EmojiList = require(Modules:WaitForChild("EmojiList"))
local CWC = TextChatService:WaitForChild("ChatWindowConfiguration")
local CIBC = TextChatService:WaitForChild("ChatInputBarConfiguration")
local appLayout = UI.appLayout
local RCTScrollContentView = appLayout.window.scrollingView.bottomLockedScrollView.RCTScrollView.RCTScrollContentView
local TextContainer = appLayout.inputBar.Background.Container.TextContainer
local Textbox = TextContainer.TextBoxContainer.TextBox
local Typing = appLayout.someStuff.TypingText
local TargetChannelChip = TextContainer.TargetChannelChip
local muted = false
local cstatus, cstatusdata = "All", nil
local execCmd, isCmd = TextChatCommands[1], TextChatCommands[2]
local defaultSize = appLayout.Size
local placeholderText = ""
local peopleTypingRn = {}
local encode = shared.code.encode

local WHITESPACES = {
	"\n\r\t\v\f",
	{
		["\n"] = " ",
		["\r"] = " ",
		["\t"] = " ",
		["\v"] = " ",
		["\f"] = " "
	}
}
local REPLACE = {
	`&<>"'`,
	{
		["&"] = "&",
		["<"] = "<",
		[">"] = ">",
		['"'] = '"',
		["'"] = ''',
	}
}

local function lerp(a, b, c)
	return a + (b - a) * c
end

local function textSet(TextGui, Config)
	if typeof(TextGui) ~= "Instance" or not (TextGui:IsA("TextLabel") or TextGui:IsA("TextBox") or TextGui:IsA("TextButton")) then
		return
	end
	if Config ~= CWC and Config ~= CIBC then
		return
	end
	TextGui.FontFace = Config.FontFace
	TextGui.TextColor3 = Config.TextColor3
	TextGui.TextSize = Config.TextSize*(TextGui == Typing and 14/18 or 1)
	TextGui.TextStrokeColor3 = Config.TextStrokeColor3
	TextGui.TextStrokeTransparency = Config.TextStrokeTransparency
	if Config == CIBC then
		TextGui.PlaceholderColor3 = Config.PlaceholderColor3
	end
end

local function log(TextChannel)
	if TextChannel:IsA("TextChannel") then
		--print('Channel', TextChannel.Name)
		TextChannel.MessageReceived:Connect(function(TextChatMessage: TextChatMessage)
			local metadata, message = TextChatMessage.Metadata, nil
			local player = Players:FindFirstChild(metadata)
			if player then
				message = received_template:Clone()
			else
				message = systemreceived_template:Clone()
			end
			Messages[#Messages+1] = message
			if player then
				local textmessage = message.TextMessage
				local metadata = TextChatMessage.Metadata
				local split = TextChatMessage.Text:split("!!separator!!")
				local prefix, bodytext = split[1], split[2]
				textmessage.PrefixText.Text = prefix
				textmessage.BodyText.Text = `<font transparency='1.0'><stroke transparency='1.0'>{prefix}</stroke></font>`..bodytext
				local textbutton = textmessage.TextMessageButton.TextButton
				if player ~= LocalPlayer then
					textbutton.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
						if player.Parent then
							Textbox.Text = `/w {player.Name} `
						end
					end)
				end
				textbutton.Text = prefix
				message.Name = TextChatMessage.MessageId:gsub("0", `{player.UserId}`, 1)
				textSet(textbutton, CWC)
				textSet(textmessage.PrefixText, CWC)
				textSet(textmessage.BodyText, CWC)
			else
				local textmessage = message.TextMessage
				if metadata == "rgb" then
					local h = 0
					local c; c = RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function(dt)
						if message.Parent then
							local cs = TextChatMessage.Text:split("")
							for i, cc in cs do
								local hue = (h+((i-1)*0.025))%1
								cs[i] = `<font color="#{Color3.fromHSV(hue,1,1):ToHex()}">{cc}</font>`
							end
							textmessage.BodyText.Text = table.concat(cs, "")
							h += dt
						else
							c:Disconnect()
						end
					end)
					message.Name = TextChatMessage.MessageId
				elseif metadata and metadata ~= "" and pcall(function() local colors = {} for _, color in metadata:split(",") do Color3.fromHex(color) end return colors end) then
					local colorsLerp = {}
					local colors = metadata:split(",")
					if #colors > 1 then
						table.insert(colorsLerp, Color3.fromHex(colors[1]))
						for i = 1, #colors-1, 1 do
							local from, to = Color3.fromHex(colors[i]), Color3.fromHex(colors[i+1])
							for e = 1, 10 do
								table.insert(colorsLerp, Color3.new(lerp(from.R, to.R, e/10), lerp(from.G, to.G, e/10), lerp(from.B, to.B, e/10)))
							end
						end
						local from, to = colorsLerp[#colorsLerp], colorsLerp[1]
						for e = 1, 10 do
							table.insert(colorsLerp, Color3.new(lerp(from.R, to.R, e/10), lerp(from.G, to.G, e/10), lerp(from.B, to.B, e/10)))
						end
						local h = 0
						local c; c = RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function(dt)
							if message.Parent then
								local cs = TextChatMessage.Text:split("")
								for i, cc in cs do
									local hue = (h+(i-1))%(#colorsLerp-#colors-1)
									cs[i] = `<font color="#{colorsLerp[math.round(hue+1)]:ToHex()}">{cc}</font>`
								end
								textmessage.BodyText.Text = table.concat(cs, "")
								h += 30*dt
							else
								c:Disconnect()
							end
						end)
						message.Name = TextChatMessage.MessageId
					else
						textmessage.BodyText.Text = `<font color="{metadata:sub(1,1) == "#" and metadata or `#{metadata}`}">{TextChatMessage.Text}</font>`
						message.Name = TextChatMessage.MessageId
					end
				else
					textmessage.BodyText.Text = TextChatMessage.Text
					message.Name = TextChatMessage.MessageId
				end
				textSet(textmessage.BodyText, CWC)
			end
			message.Parent = RCTScrollContentView
			if #Messages > 100 then
				Messages[1]:Destroy()
				table.remove(Messages, 1)
			end
		end)
	end
end

TextChatService.DescendantAdded:Connect(log)

for _, TextChannel in TextChatService:GetDescendants() do
	log(TextChannel)
end

local function CWCChanged()
	pcall(function()
		appLayout.Size = UDim2.fromScale(defaultSize.X.Scale*CWC.WidthScale, defaultSize.Y.Scale*CWC.HeightScale)
		appLayout.window.BackgroundColor3 = CWC.BackgroundColor3
		appLayout.topBorder.ImageColor3 = CWC.BackgroundColor3
		appLayout.bottomBorder.ImageColor3 = CWC.BackgroundColor3
		appLayout.topPadding.BackgroundColor3 = CWC.BackgroundColor3
		appLayout.inputBar.BackgroundColor3 = CWC.BackgroundColor3
		appLayout.someStuff.BackgroundColor3 = CWC.BackgroundColor3
		if os.clock() <= oc then
			appLayout.window.BackgroundTransparency = CWC.BackgroundTransparency
			appLayout.topBorder.ImageTransparency = CWC.BackgroundTransparency
			appLayout.bottomBorder.ImageTransparency = CWC.BackgroundTransparency
			appLayout.topPadding.BackgroundTransparency = CWC.BackgroundTransparency
			appLayout.inputBar.BackgroundTransparency = CWC.BackgroundTransparency
			appLayout.someStuff.BackgroundTransparency = CWC.BackgroundTransparency
		end

		local AP = appLayout.AnchorPoint
		local Pos = appLayout.Position

		if CWC.HorizontalAlignment == Enum.HorizontalAlignment.Left then
			appLayout.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0, AP.Y)
			appLayout.Position = UDim2.new(0, 8, Pos.Y.Scale, Pos.Y.Offset)
		elseif CWC.HorizontalAlignment == Enum.HorizontalAlignment.Center then
			appLayout.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, AP.Y)
			appLayout.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, Pos.Y.Scale, Pos.Y.Offset)
		elseif CWC.HorizontalAlignment == Enum.HorizontalAlignment.Right then
			appLayout.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(1, AP.Y)
			appLayout.Position = UDim2.new(1, -8, Pos.Y.Scale, Pos.Y.Offset)
		end

		if CWC.VerticalAlignment == Enum.VerticalAlignment.Top then
			appLayout.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(AP.X, 0)
			appLayout.Position = UDim2.new(Pos.X.Scale, Pos.X.Offset, 0, 4)
		elseif CWC.VerticalAlignment == Enum.VerticalAlignment.Center then
			appLayout.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(AP.X, 0.5)
			appLayout.Position = UDim2.new(Pos.X.Scale, Pos.X.Offset, 0.5, 0)
		elseif CWC.VerticalAlignment == Enum.VerticalAlignment.Bottom then
			appLayout.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(AP.X, 1)
			appLayout.Position = UDim2.new(Pos.X.Scale, Pos.X.Offset, 1, -4)
		end

		textSet(Typing, CWC)

		for _, message in Messages do
			textSet(message:FindFirstChild("TextButton", true), CWC)
			textSet(message:FindFirstChild("PrefixText", true), CWC)
			textSet(message:FindFirstChild("BodyText", true), CWC)
		end
	end)
end

local function CIBCChanged()
	pcall(function()
		CIBC.TextBox = nil
		appLayout.inputBar.Background.BackgroundColor3 = CIBC.BackgroundColor3
		if os.clock() <= oc then
			appLayout.inputBar.Background.BackgroundTransparency = CIBC.BackgroundTransparency
		end
		textSet(Textbox, CIBC)
	end)
end

CWC.Changed:Connect(CWCChanged)
CIBC.Changed:Connect(CIBCChanged)
CWCChanged()
CIBCChanged()

CWC.AttributeChanged:Connect(function()
	pcall(function()
		appLayout.window.Visible = CWC:GetAttribute("CustomEnabled")
	end)
end)
CIBC.AttributeChanged:Connect(function()
	pcall(function()
		if muted then
			appLayout.inputBar.Visible = false
		else
			appLayout.inputBar.Visible = CIBC:GetAttribute("CustomEnabled")
		end
	end)
end)

TextChatService:WaitForChild("TextChatCommands"):WaitForChild("RBXClearCommand").Triggered:Connect(function()
	for _, message in RCTScrollContentView:GetChildren() do
		if message:IsA("Frame") then
			message:Destroy()
		end
	end
	Messages = {}
end)

local function CheckMessage(text)
	text = text:gsub(`[{WHITESPACES[1]}]`, WHITESPACES[2])
	text = text:gsub(`[{REPLACE[1]}]`, REPLACE[2])
	local text = (text):split(" ")
	local whatrm = {}
	for index, _ in text do
		if text[index] == "" then
			whatrm[#whatrm+1] = index
		end
	end
	local lol = 0
	for _, index in whatrm do
		table.remove(text, index-lol)
		lol += 1
	end
	return table.concat(text, " ")
end

local function GetPlayer(name: string)
	name = name:lower()
	local players = {}
	for _, player in Players:GetPlayers() do
		if player == LocalPlayer then continue end
		if player.DisplayName:lower():sub(1,name:len()) == name or player.Name:lower():sub(1,name:len()) == name then
			players[#players+1] = player
		end
	end
	return #players == 1 and players[1]
end

local function clientsend(msg)
	local correctedmsg = CheckMessage(msg)
	if correctedmsg == "" or correctedmsg:gsub(" ", "") == "" or #correctedmsg > 200 or muted then return end
	local C = not LocalPlayer.Neutral and LocalPlayer.TeamColor.Color or ComputeNameColor(LocalPlayer.Name)
	local message = received_template:Clone()
	local prefix = `<font color="#{C:ToHex()}">{(typeof(cstatusdata) == "Instance" and cstatusdata:IsA("Player") and `</font>[{cstatus}] <font color="#{C:ToHex()}">`) or (cstatus ~= "All" and `[{cstatus}] `) or ""}{LocalPlayer.DisplayName}{LocalPlayer:GetAttribute("IconInChat") and `<font family="rbxasset://LuaPackages/Packages/_Index/BuilderIcons/BuilderIcons/BuilderIcons.json" color="#ffffff">{LocalPlayer:GetAttribute("IconInChat")}</font>` or ""}{LocalPlayer.HasVerifiedBadge and utf8.char(0xE000) or ""}:</font>`
	message.LayoutOrder = 2
	message.TextMessage.PrefixText.TextTransparency = 0.375
	message.TextMessage.BodyText.TextTransparency = 0.375
	message.TextMessage.PrefixText.Text = prefix
	message.TextMessage.BodyText.Text = `<font transparency='1.0'><stroke transparency='1.0'>{prefix}</stroke></font> {correctedmsg}`
	message.Name = "__tmp_msg"
	textSet(message:FindFirstChild("TextButton", true), CWC)
	textSet(message:FindFirstChild("PrefixText", true), CWC)
	textSet(message:FindFirstChild("BodyText", true), CWC)
	message.Parent = appLayout:WaitForChild("window").scrollingView.bottomLockedScrollView.RCTScrollView.RCTScrollContentView
	task.spawn(function()
		local emsg = encode(msg)
		if cstatus == "All" then
			send:InvokeServer(emsg)
		elseif cstatus == "Team" then
			execCmd(`/team {msg}`)
			ping:InvokeServer(emsg)
		elseif typeof(cstatusdata) == "Instance" and cstatusdata:IsA("Player") then
			execCmd(`/w {cstatusdata.Name} {msg}`)
			ping:InvokeServer(emsg)
		end
		message:Destroy()
	end)
	return true
end

Remotes:WaitForChild("StatusChanged").OnClientEvent:Connect(function(status)
	muted = status
	if not muted then
		Textbox.Text = ""
	end
end)

local sendi = appLayout:WaitForChild("inputBar").Background.Container.SendButton.SendIcon
local ShowInfo = TweenInfo.new(0)
local HideInfo = TweenInfo.new(0.7, Enum.EasingStyle.Sine, Enum.EasingDirection.Out)

local Show = {
	TweenService:Create(appLayout:WaitForChild("window"), ShowInfo, {BackgroundTransparency = CWC.BackgroundTransparency}),
	TweenService:Create(appLayout:WaitForChild("inputBar"), ShowInfo, {BackgroundTransparency = CWC.BackgroundTransparency}),
	TweenService:Create(appLayout.topPadding, ShowInfo, {BackgroundTransparency = CWC.BackgroundTransparency}),
	TweenService:Create(appLayout.bottomBorder, ShowInfo, {ImageTransparency = CWC.BackgroundTransparency}),
	TweenService:Create(appLayout.topBorder, ShowInfo, {ImageTransparency = CWC.BackgroundTransparency}),
	TweenService:Create(appLayout:WaitForChild("inputBar").Background, ShowInfo, {BackgroundTransparency = CIBC.BackgroundTransparency}),
	TweenService:Create(appLayout:WaitForChild("inputBar").Background.Border, ShowInfo, {Transparency = 0.8}),
	TweenService:Create(appLayout:WaitForChild("window").scrollingView.bottomLockedScrollView.RCTScrollView, ShowInfo, {ScrollBarImageTransparency = 0.3}),
	TweenService:Create(TargetChannelChip, ShowInfo, {TextTransparency = 0}),
	TweenService:Create(Typing.Parent, ShowInfo, {BackgroundTransparency = CWC.BackgroundTransparency}),
}
local Hide = {
	TweenService:Create(appLayout:WaitForChild("window"), HideInfo, {BackgroundTransparency = 1}),
	TweenService:Create(appLayout:WaitForChild("inputBar"), HideInfo, {BackgroundTransparency = 1}),
	TweenService:Create(appLayout.topPadding, HideInfo, {BackgroundTransparency = 1}),
	TweenService:Create(appLayout.bottomBorder, HideInfo, {ImageTransparency = 1}),
	TweenService:Create(appLayout.topBorder, HideInfo, {ImageTransparency = 1}),
	TweenService:Create(appLayout:WaitForChild("inputBar").Background, HideInfo, {BackgroundTransparency = 1}),
	TweenService:Create(appLayout:WaitForChild("inputBar").Background.Border, HideInfo, {Transparency = 1}),
	TweenService:Create(appLayout:WaitForChild("window").scrollingView.bottomLockedScrollView.RCTScrollView, HideInfo, {ScrollBarImageTransparency = 1}),
	TweenService:Create(Textbox, HideInfo, {TextTransparency = 1, TextStrokeTransparency = 1}),
	TweenService:Create(sendi, HideInfo, {TextTransparency = 1}),
	TweenService:Create(TargetChannelChip, HideInfo, {TextTransparency = 1}),
	TweenService:Create(Typing.Parent, HideInfo, {BackgroundTransparency = 1}),
}

local ddinfo = {}
local dd = appLayout:WaitForChild("inputBar").AutocompleteDropdown
local uhh = dd.ScrollBarFrame.ScrollViewFrame.ScrollView.OffsetFrame
local selected = nil

local function selectindex(index)
	print(selected, index)
	local info = ddinfo[index]
	if info then
		local ac = info[2]
		if typeof(ac) == "Instance" then
			for _, info in ddinfo do
				info[2].TextLabelButton.BackgroundTransparency = 1
			end
			ac.TextLabelButton.BackgroundTransparency = 0.85
			uhh.Parent.CanvasPosition = Vector2.new(0, uhh.Parent.CanvasPosition.Y + ac.AbsoluteSize.Y*(index-selected))
			selected = index
		end
	end
end

local function enter(lastColon, name)
	if selected then
		if lastColon ~= 0 then
			Textbox.Text = Textbox.Text:gsub(":"..name, EmojiList[ddinfo[selected][1]].base)
		else
			Textbox.Text = ddinfo[selected][1]
		end
		task.spawn(function()
			RunService.RenderStepped:Wait()
			Textbox:CaptureFocus()
		end)
	end
end

local function commandautocomplete()
	if not CIBC.AutocompleteEnabled then
		local layout = uhh["$layout"]:Clone()
		uhh:ClearAllChildren()
		layout.Parent = uhh
		dd.Visible = false
		ddinfo = {}
		selected = nil
		return
	end
	local lol = 0
	local layout = uhh["$layout"]:Clone()
	uhh:ClearAllChildren()
	layout.Parent = uhh
	ddinfo = {}
	for _, command in TextChatService:GetDescendants() do
		if command:IsA("TextChatCommand") and command.PrimaryAlias:lower():find(Textbox.Text:lower()) then
			lol += 1
			ddinfo[#ddinfo+1] = {command.PrimaryAlias, autocomplete_template:Clone(), Textbox.text:lower()}
		end
	end
	table.sort(ddinfo, function(a,b)
		return a[1]:lower() < b[1]:lower()
	end)
	for i, command in ddinfo do
		local ac = command[2]
		ac.Name = command[1]
		ac.TextLabelButton.TextLabel.Text = command[1]
		ac.TextLabelButton.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function()
			Textbox.Text = command[1]
			RunService.RenderStepped:Wait()
			Textbox:CaptureFocus()
			selected = nil
		end)
		ac.TextLabelButton.MouseEnter:Connect(function()
			for _, command in ddinfo do
				command[2].TextLabelButton.BackgroundTransparency = 1
			end
			ac.TextLabelButton.BackgroundTransparency = 0.85
			selected = i
		end)
		if i == 1 then
			ac.TextLabelButton.BackgroundTransparency = 0.85
			selected = i
		end
		ac.Parent = uhh
	end
	lol *= 30
	dd.Size = UDim2.new(0.95, 0, 0, (lol > 105 and 105 or lol))
	if lol <= 0 or (lol <= 30 and Textbox.Text:lower() == ddinfo[1][1]) then
		local layout = uhh["$layout"]:Clone()
		uhh:ClearAllChildren()
		layout.Parent = uhh
		dd.Visible = false
		ddinfo = {}
		selected = nil
	else
		dd.Visible = true
	end
end

local function textAfterLastColon(text: string)
	local lastColon = text:reverse():find(":")
	if lastColon then
		lastColon *= -1
		return text:sub(lastColon+1,#text):split(" ")[1]
	else
		return text
	end
end

local function emojiautocomplete(lastColon)
	if not CIBC.AutocompleteEnabled or lastColon == 0 then
		local layout = uhh["$layout"]:Clone()
		uhh:ClearAllChildren()
		layout.Parent = uhh
		dd.Visible = false
		ddinfo = {}
		selected = nil
		return
	end
	local len = #Textbox.Text
	local name = textAfterLastColon(Textbox.Text)
	if #name < 2 then
		local layout = uhh["$layout"]:Clone()
		uhh:ClearAllChildren()
		layout.Parent = uhh
		dd.Visible = false
		ddinfo = {}
		selected = nil
		return
	end
	local lol = 0
	local layout = uhh["$layout"]:Clone()
	uhh:ClearAllChildren()
	layout.Parent = uhh
	ddinfo = {}
	for emoji, info in EmojiList do
		if emoji:lower():sub(1,#name) == name:lower() then
			lol += 1
			ddinfo[#ddinfo+1] = {emoji, emojiautocomplete_template:Clone(), name}
		end
	end
	table.sort(ddinfo, function(a,b)
		return EmojiList[a[1]].popularity < EmojiList[b[1]].popularity
	end)
	for i, info in ddinfo do
		local ac = info[2]
		ac.Name = info[1]
		ac.TextLabelButton.EmojiLabel.Text = EmojiList[info[1]].base
		ac.TextLabelButton.TextLabel.Text = info[1]
		ac.TextLabelButton.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function()
			Textbox.Text = Textbox.Text:gsub(":"..name, EmojiList[ddinfo[selected][1]].base)
			RunService.RenderStepped:Wait()
			Textbox:CaptureFocus()
			selected = nil
		end)
		ac.TextLabelButton.MouseEnter:Connect(function()
			for _, info in ddinfo do
				info[2].TextLabelButton.BackgroundTransparency = 1
			end
			ac.TextLabelButton.BackgroundTransparency = 0.85
			selected = i
		end)
		if i == 1 then
			ac.TextLabelButton.BackgroundTransparency = 0.85
			selected = i
		end
		ac.Parent = uhh
	end
	lol *= 30
	dd.Size = UDim2.new(0.95, 0, 0, (lol > 105 and 105 or lol))
	if lol <= 0 or (lol <= 30 and Textbox.Text:lower() == ddinfo[1][1]) then
		local layout = uhh["$layout"]:Clone()
		uhh:ClearAllChildren()
		layout.Parent = uhh
		dd.Visible = false
		selected = nil
	else
		dd.Visible = true
	end
end

local function ChangeChatStatus(status: string, data: any)
	cstatus = status
	cstatusdata = data
	TargetChannelChip.Text = status == "All" and "" or `[{status}]`
	if TargetChannelChip.Text == "" then
		TargetChannelChip.Visible = false
		Textbox.Parent.Size = UDim2.new(1,-8,0,0)
	else
		TargetChannelChip.Visible = true
		Textbox.Parent.Size = UDim2.new(1,-8-TargetChannelChip.AbsoluteSize.X,0,0)
		task.wait()
		Textbox.Text = ""
	end
end

TargetChannelChip.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
	ChangeChatStatus("All")
end)

Textbox.Focused:Connect(function()
	focused = true
	oc = os.clock()+3
	Textbox.PlaceholderText = ""
end)

Textbox.FocusLost:Connect(function()
	focused = false
	oc = os.clock()+3
	RunService.RenderStepped:Wait()
	dd.Visible = false
	Textbox.PlaceholderText = placeholderText
end)

local comma = '<font color="#b2b2b2">,</font>'
local ddd = '<font color="#b2b2b2">...</font>'
typingchange.OnClientEvent:Connect(function(player, typing)
	local found = table.find(peopleTypingRn, player)
	if not found and typing then
		table.insert(peopleTypingRn, player)
	elseif found and not typing then
		table.remove(peopleTypingRn, found)
	end

	local fixed = {}
	for _, player in peopleTypingRn do
		table.insert(fixed, player.DisplayName)
	end

	local success, error = pcall(function()
		if #peopleTypingRn > 3 then
			Typing.Text = (`%s{comma} %s{comma} %s{ddd} +{#peopleTypingRn-3} players <font color="#b2b2b2">are typing...</font>`):format(unpack(fixed))
		elseif #peopleTypingRn == 3 then
			Typing.Text = (`%s{comma} %s{comma} and %s <font color="#b2b2b2">are typing...</font>`):format(unpack(fixed))
		elseif #peopleTypingRn == 2 then
			Typing.Text = (`%s and %s <font color="#b2b2b2">are typing...</font>`):format(unpack(fixed))
		elseif #peopleTypingRn == 1 then
			Typing.Text = (`%s <font color="#b2b2b2">is typing...</font>`):format(unpack(fixed))
		else
			Typing.Text = `<font color="#b2b2b2">No one is typing.</font>`
		end
	end)
	if not success then
		Typing.Text = 'Several people <font color="#b2b2b2">are typing...</font>'
	end
end)

local lastColon = 0

local function getColons(text: string)
	return #text - #text:gsub(":", "")
end

local function findLastColon(text: string)
	local lastColon = text:reverse():find(":")
	lastColon = lastColon and #text - lastColon + 1 or 0
	return lastColon
end

Textbox:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Text"):Connect(function()
	if os.clock() < oc then
		if Textbox.Text == "" or muted then
			Textbox.TextTransparency = 0.5
			Textbox.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.5
			sendi.TextTransparency = 0.5
			typingchange:FireServer(false)
		else
			Textbox.TextTransparency = 0
			Textbox.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.5
			sendi.TextTransparency = 0
			if Textbox:IsFocused() then
				typingchange:FireServer(true)
			end
		end
	end
	Textbox.Text = Textbox.Text:sub(1,200)
	local len = #Textbox.Text
	local lastColonN = findLastColon(Textbox.Text)
	local bool = getColons(Textbox.Text)%2 == 0
	if Textbox.Text:sub(1,1) == "/" then
		commandautocomplete()
		local split = Textbox.Text:split(" ")
		if (split[1] == "/w" or split[1] == "/whisper") and split[2] then
			local player = GetPlayer(split[2])
			if player then
				ChangeChatStatus(`To {player.DisplayName}`, player)
			end
		end
	elseif lastColonN ~= 0 and lastColon == 0 then
		lastColon = lastColonN
	elseif lastColonN ~= 0 and lastColonN ~= lastColon and bool and lastColon ~= 0 then
		local emoji = EmojiList[Textbox.Text:sub(lastColon+1,lastColonN-1)]
		if emoji then
			RunService.RenderStepped:Wait()
			Textbox.Text = Textbox.Text:gsub(Textbox.Text:sub(lastColon,lastColonN), emoji.base)
		end
		lastColon = 0
		emojiautocomplete(lastColon)
	elseif lastColonN ~= 0 then
		emojiautocomplete(lastColon)
	elseif lastColonN == 0 and lastColon ~= 0 then
		lastColon = 0
		emojiautocomplete(lastColon)
	else
		local layout = uhh["$layout"]:Clone()
		uhh:ClearAllChildren()
		layout.Parent = uhh
		dd.Visible = false
		ddinfo = {}
		selected = nil
	end
end)

task.spawn(function()
	while task.wait() do
		if os.clock() > oc then
			if focused then
				oc = os.clock()+0.1
			else
				for i,v in pairs(Hide) do
					v:Play()
				end
				repeat task.wait() until os.clock() <= oc
				for i,v in pairs(Show) do
					v:Play()
				end
				TweenService:Create(Textbox, ShowInfo, {TextTransparency = (Textbox.Text == "" and 0.5 or 0), TextStrokeTransparency = CIBC.TextStrokeTransparency}):Play()
				TweenService:Create(sendi, ShowInfo, {TextTransparency = (Textbox.Text == "" and 0.5 or 0), TextStrokeTransparency = CIBC.TextStrokeTransparency}):Play()
			end
		end
	end
end)

task.spawn(function()
	while true do
		local s,b = pcall(function()
			return StarterGui:GetCore("ChatActive")
		end)
		if s and b and StarterGui:GetCoreGuiEnabled(Enum.CoreGuiType.Chat) then
			appLayout.Visible = true
		else
			appLayout.Visible = false
			oc = os.clock()+3
		end
		task.wait()
	end
end)

local sizey = 0

for _, gb in appLayout:GetChildren() do
	if gb:IsA("GuiObject") then
		sizey += gb.AbsoluteSize.Y
	end
end


for _, gb in appLayout:GetChildren() do
	if gb:IsA("GuiObject") then
		gb:GetPropertyChangedSignal("GuiState"):Connect(function()
			if gb.GuiState ~= Enum.GuiState.Idle then
				while gb.GuiState ~= Enum.GuiState.Idle do
					oc = os.clock()+3
					task.wait()
				end
			end
		end)
	end
end

UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
	if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch and (input.Position.X >= appLayout.AbsolutePosition.X and input.Position.X <= appLayout.AbsolutePosition.X+appLayout.AbsoluteSize.X) and (input.Position.Y >= appLayout.AbsolutePosition.Y and input.Position.Y <= appLayout.AbsolutePosition.Y+sizey) then
		oc = os.clock()+3
	end
end)

UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(input, gpe)
	if selected then
		if input.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.Up and gpe then
			selectindex(selected-1)
		end
		if input.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.Down and gpe then
			selectindex(selected+1)
		end
	end
	if input.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.Space and gpe then
		if Textbox.Text:split(" ")[1] == "/team" and LocalPlayer.Team then
			ChangeChatStatus("Team")
		end
	end
	if input.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.Backspace then
		local whenCanRemove = os.clock()
		while input.UserInputState ~= Enum.UserInputState.End do
			if Textbox.Text ~= "" then
				whenCanRemove = os.clock()+.3
			end
			if cstatus == "All" then
				break
			end
			if Textbox.Text == "" and cstatus ~= "All" and os.clock()-whenCanRemove >= 0 then
				ChangeChatStatus("All")
				break
			end
			task.wait()
		end
	end
	if input.KeyCode == CIBC.KeyboardKeyCode and not gpe and not muted then
		StarterGui:SetCore("ChatActive", true)
		task.wait()
		Textbox:CaptureFocus()
	end
end)

local function browhatuse()
	local te, ke, me = UserInputService.TouchEnabled, UserInputService.KeyboardEnabled, UserInputService.MouseEnabled
	if te and ke and me then
		return "To chat click/tap here or press / key"
	elseif te and ke and not me then
		return "To chat tap here or press / key"
	elseif te and not ke and me then
		return "To chat click or tap here"
	elseif te and not ke and not me then
		return "To chat tap here"
	elseif not te and ke and me then
		return "To chat click here or press / key"
	elseif not te and ke and not me then
		return "To chat press / key"
	elseif not te and not ke and me then
		return "To chat click here"
	elseif not te and not ke and not me then
		return "Bro can you even do something?"
	end
end

local function change(p)
	if p == "TouchEnabled" or p == "KeyboardEnabled" or p == "MouseEnabled" or p == "justchangeitbro" then
		placeholderText = browhatuse()
		if not Textbox:IsFocused() then
			Textbox.PlaceholderText = placeholderText
		end
	end
end

UserInputService.Changed:Connect(change)
change("justchangeitbro")

local rtc = RCTScrollContentView
local oldsize = rtc.AbsoluteSize
RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
	if rtc.AbsoluteSize ~= oldsize then
		local m = rtc.AbsoluteSize.Y-oldsize.Y
		m = m < 0 and m*-1 or m
		rtc.Parent.CanvasPosition = Vector2.new(rtc.Parent.CanvasPosition.X, rtc.Parent.CanvasPosition.Y+m)
		oldsize = rtc.AbsoluteSize
	end

	if muted then
		if Textbox.Interactable then
			if os.clock() < oc then
				Textbox.TextTransparency = 0.5
				sendi.TextTransparency = 0.5
			end
			Textbox.Interactable = false
			Textbox.Text = `{muted.Mins and "Temporary muted" or "Muted"} by {muted.Admin}`
		end
		if appLayout.inputBar.Visible then
			appLayout.inputBar.Visible = false
		end
	else
		if not Textbox.Interactable then
			Textbox.Text = ""
			Textbox.Interactable = true
		end
		if appLayout.inputBar.Visible ~= CIBC:GetAttribute("CustomEnabled") then
			appLayout.inputBar.Visible = CIBC:GetAttribute("CustomEnabled")
		end
	end
end)

local function send()
	if Textbox.Interactable then
		local message = Textbox.Text
		Textbox.Text = ""
		task.delay(0.001, function()
			Textbox.Text = ""
		end)
		if isCmd(message) then
			execCmd(message)
			return
		end
		clientsend(message)
	end
end

sendi.Parent.MouseButton1Click:Connect(send)

Textbox.FocusLost:Connect(function(enterr)
	if enterr then
		if Textbox.Text:split(" ")[1] == "/team" and LocalPlayer.Team then
			ChangeChatStatus("Team")
			RunService.RenderStepped:Wait()
			Textbox:CaptureFocus()
			return
		end
		if selected then
			enter(lastColon, ddinfo[selected][3])
			RunService.RenderStepped:Wait()
			Textbox:CaptureFocus()
			return
		end
		send()
	end
end)

TextChatService:WaitForChild("NOTRBXGeneral"):DisplaySystemMessage(`Type '/?' or '/help' for a list of chat commands`, "d4d4d4")
RunService.RenderStepped:Wait()
while not UserInputService.TouchEnabled or UserInputService.KeyboardEnabled do
	RunService.RenderStepped:Wait()
end
TextChatService:WaitForChild("NOTRBXGeneral"):DisplaySystemMessage(`WARNING! Some features may not work properly on your device`, "f74b52")
